title: Project Task-Management System
shortDescription: A production-ready REST API built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL, featuring OAuth2 authentication, automated testing, and CI/CD integration for high-concurrency environments.
overview: This production-grade REST API platform was architected to serve as a robust backbone for modern web applications. Built using the high-performance FastAPI framework, it implements a multi-layered security architecture with asynchronous database handling for maximum throughput. The system features a custom-built JWT authentication flow with refresh token rotation, ensuring secure and persistent user sessions.

steps.title: Database Design
steps.description: Normalization and schema modeling for high-performance relations using Alembic for migrations.

steps.title: Authentication Flow
steps.description: Implementing OAuth2 with Password Flow, hashing credentials with BCrypt, and issuing signed JWTs.

steps.title: API Development
steps.description: Developing modular endpoints following RESTful principles with Pydantic for strict data validation.

steps.title: Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Unit testing with Pytest and containerization via Docker for seamless CI/CD pipeline integration.

challenges.title: Managing JWT Expiry
challenges.description: Handling seamless user sessions without compromising security. Implemented a Dual-Token system with short-lived Access Tokens and long-lived Refresh Tokens stored in HTTP-only cookies.

challenges.title: Query Performance
challenges.description: As the dataset grew, certain relational queries slowed down. Used EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify bottlenecks and applied composite indices on frequently queried foreign keys.
